caption: Figure 1: Depth up-scaling for the case with $n = 32, s = 48$, and $m = 8$. Depth up-scaling is achieved through a dual-stage process of depthwise scaling followed by continued pretraining.
description: A diagram illustrating the two-step process of depth up-scaling. Step 1-1 shows a 32-layer base model being copied. Step 1-2 shows the removal of 8 layers from each copy and merging them to form a 48-layer model. Step 2 shows the continued pretraining of the 48-layer model.
